mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APPROVAL_REQ ( approval_document_id, document_title, reference_table_name, reference_id, requester, request_date, attachment_count, reg_date, register ) VALUES ( #{approvalDocumentId}, #{documentTitle}, #{referenceTableName}, #{referenceId}, #{requester}, NOW(), #{attachmentCount}, NOW(), #{register} )
mapper.select: SELECT emp_id AS empId, emp_name AS empName, pos_id AS posId, dep_name AS depName FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE emp_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APP_LINE_TEMPLATE ( template_id, template_name, owner_id, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{templateId}, #{templateName}, #{ownerId}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO LEAVE ( leave_id, emp_id, leave_status, leave_start_date, leave_end_date, leave_unn, leave_days, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{leaveId}, #{empId}, #{leaveStatus}, #{leaveStartDate}, #{leaveEndDate}, #{leaveUnn}, #{leaveDays}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO BUSINESS ( business_trip_id, emp_id, business_trip_start, business_trip_end, trip_location, business_trip_purpose, app_register, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{businessTripId}, #{empId}, #{businessTripStart}, #{businessTripEnd}, #{tripLocation}, #{businessTripPurpose}, #{appRegister}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT a.template_id, a.approval_order, a.approver_id, a.approver_role, e.emp_name AS empName, d.dep_name AS depName, e.pos_id AS posId FROM APP_LINE_TEMPLATE_DETAIL a JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON a.approver_id = e.emp_id JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON e.dep_id = d.dep_id WHERE a.template_id = #{templateId} ORDER BY a.approval_order
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APP_LINE_TEMPLATE WHERE template_name = #{templateName}

SELECT t.template_id, t.template_name, d.template_id AS d_template_id, d.approval_order, d.approver_id, d.approver_role, e.emp_name, e.dep_name, e.pos_id FROM APP_LINE_TEMPLATE t LEFT JOIN APP_LINE_TEMPLATE_DETAIL d ON t.template_id = d.template_id LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON d.approver_id = e.emp_id WHERE t.owner_id = #{ownerId} ORDER BY t.template_id, d.approval_order
